---
title: "PD_analysis"
format: html
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(rtracklayer)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(STRINGdb)
library(tibble)
library(tximport)
library(txdbmaker)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggdist)
library(ggpubr)
library(GSVA)
library(readr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(GseaVis)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(GenomeInfoDbData)
library(ggplot2)
library(factoextra)
library(UpSetR)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(DT)
library(downloadthis)
library(ReactomePA)
library(viridis)
library(stringr)
library(ggrepel)
library(DT)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
meta_data <- read.table("data/metadata_PD.tsv",
                        header = TRUE,
                        sep = "\t",
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

meta_data <- meta_data %>%
  rename(
    sampleid   = ID,
    diff_method = Ergicity,
    diagnosis  = Health.PD,
    individual = Pub.name,
    batch      = Cells.Msc.SPb
  )

meta_data$diagnosis   <- ifelse(meta_data$diagnosis == "H", "control", "PD")

meta_data$diagnosis   <- factor(meta_data$diagnosis)
meta_data$diff_method <- factor(meta_data$diff_method)
meta_data$individual  <- factor(meta_data$individual)
meta_data$batch       <- factor(meta_data$batch)

meta_data$diagnosis <- relevel(meta_data$diagnosis, ref = "control")


```

# Импортирование данных по квантификации Salmon
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
datatable(meta_data, 
          caption = "Table 1. Metadata.",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
files <- file.path("data/salmon", meta_data$sampleid, "quant.sf")
names(files) <- meta_data$sampleid
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
# Annotation
gtf <- import("data/gencode.v49.chr_patch_hapl_scaff.annotation.gtf")
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
gtf_df <- as.data.frame(gtf)

tx2gene <- unique(
  gtf_df[gtf_df$type == "transcript",
         c("transcript_id", "gene_id")]
)

colnames(tx2gene) <- c("TXNAME", "GENEID")

# Get rid of version
tx2gene$TXNAME <- sub("\\..*", "", tx2gene$TXNAME)
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

# Import Salmon data
txi <- tximport(files,
                type = "salmon",
                tx2gene = tx2gene,
                ignoreTxVersion = TRUE,
                ignoreAfterBar = TRUE)
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

# DESeq object
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(
  txi,
  colData = meta_data,
  design = ~ batch + diff_method + diagnosis
)


# Filter low expression
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds) >= 10) > ncol(dds)*0.9
dds <- dds[keep,]

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
count.table <- assay(dds)

datatable(count.table, 
          caption = "Table 2. Count table.",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
dds <- DESeq(dds)

res <- results(dds, name = "diagnosis_PD_vs_control")

res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
res_df$gene_id <- rownames(res_df)

# Remove version ENSG
res_df$gene_id <- sub("\\..*", "", res_df$gene_id)

res_df <- res_df[!is.na(res_df$padj), ]
res_df <- res_df[order(res_df$padj), ]
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
write.csv(res_df, "DESeq2_full_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
# Gene ranking for GSEA
gene_ranks <- res_df$log2FoldChange
names(gene_ranks) <- res_df$gene_id

# remove NA
gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!is.na(gene_ranks)]

# remove gene duplicates
gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]

gene_ranks <- sort(gene_ranks, decreasing = TRUE)
```


# Запуск DESeq2 анализа дифференциальной экспрессии
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

datatable(res_df, 
          caption = "Table 3. DESeq2 results.",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```


# Анализ главных компонент
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = F)
vsd <- assay(vsd)

PCA_vst <- prcomp(t(vsd))
PCA_vst.points <- as.data.frame(PCA_vst$x)
PCA_vst.points <- merge(meta_data, cbind(rownames(PCA_vst.points), PCA_vst.points), by = 1)

PCA_plot <- ggplot(PCA_vst.points, aes(PC1, PC2, col = diff_method, shape = diagnosis))+
    geom_point(size = 2.75)+
    # geom_text(size = 3)+
    theme_bw()+
    theme(legend.position = "right")+
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1")+
    xlab("PC1")+
    ylab("PC2")

prop_plot <- fviz_eig(PCA_vst, col.var="blue") + ggtitle("Proportion of variance")
```

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=5.5}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
download_this(
  PCA_plot,
  output_name = "PCA_plot",
  output_extension = ".pdf",
  button_label = "PDF",
  button_type = "primary"
)
```


```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=5.5}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Figure 1. PCA visualization using regularized log transformation counts.
PCA_plot
```


```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=5.5}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
download_this(
  prop_plot,
  output_name = "prop_plot",
  output_extension = ".pdf",
  button_label = "PDF",
  button_type = "primary"
)
```


```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=5.5}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Figure 2. The proportion of explained variance of each component.
prop_plot
```


# Volcano plot
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
res_df <- res_df %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1 ~ "p-value and log2 FC",
      padj < 0.05 ~ "p-value",
      abs(log2FoldChange) > 1 ~ "Log2 FC",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    )
  )

volcano_plot <- ggplot(res_df,
       aes(x = log2FoldChange,
           y = -log10(padj),
           color = significance)) +

  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "NS" = "grey70",
    "Log2 FC" = "green3",
    "p-value" = "royalblue",
    "p-value and log2 FC" = "red"
  )) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1,1),
             linetype="dashed") +

  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05),
             linetype="dashed") +

  geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(res_df, padj < 1e-5 | abs(log2FoldChange) > 3),
      aes(label = gene_id),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 20
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "PD vs Control",
    subtitle = "Volcano plot",
    x = "Log2 fold change",
    y = expression(-Log[10]~P)
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +

  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face="bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
pdf("Volcano_plot_PD_vs_Control.pdf", width=8, height=6)
print(volcano_plot)
dev.off()
```


```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Figure 3. Volcano plot.
volcano_plot
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
# Upload gene signatures
precursor_genes <- scan(
  "data/downregulation.txt",
  what = "",
  quiet = TRUE
)

mature_genes <- scan(
  "data/upregulation.txt",
  what = "",
  quiet = TRUE
)

gene_sets <- list(
  Neural_precursors = precursor_genes,
  Mature_neurons = mature_genes
)
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
# GSEA analysis
gsea_res <- fgsea(
  pathways = gene_sets,
  stats = gene_ranks,
  minSize = 10,
  maxSize = 500,
  nperm = 10000
)

gsea_res_df <- as.data.frame(gsea_res)

gsea_res_df$leadingEdge <- sapply(
  gsea_res_df$leadingEdge,
  paste,
  collapse = ";"
)

write.csv(
  gsea_res_df,
  "GSEA_neuron_signatures.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
datatable(
  gsea_res_df,
  caption = "Table 6. GSEA enrichment of neuronal signatures.",
  style = "bootstrap5",
  extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(
    dom = 'lBfrtip',
    buttons = c('csv','excel')
  )
)
```


# GSEA enrichment plots
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
gsea_precursor_plot <- plotEnrichment(
  gene_sets$Neural_precursors,
  gene_ranks
) +
  labs(title = "Neural precursor signature enrichment")

gsea_mature_plot <- plotEnrichment(
  gene_sets$Mature_neurons,
  gene_ranks
) +
  labs(title = "Mature neuron signature enrichment")
```


```{r}
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: Figure 4. GSEA enrichment for neural precursor signature.
gsea_precursor_plot
```


```{r}
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: Figure 5. GSEA enrichment for mature neuron signature.
gsea_mature_plot
```



# DEGs
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
padj_cutoff <- 0.05
lfc_cutoff  <- 1

up_disease <- res_df %>%
  filter(padj < padj_cutoff & log2FoldChange > lfc_cutoff)

down_disease <- res_df %>%
  filter(padj < padj_cutoff & log2FoldChange < -lfc_cutoff)

up_control <- down_disease
down_control <- up_disease

write.csv(up_disease,   "DEG_up_in_disease.csv",   row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(down_disease, "DEG_down_in_disease.csv", row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(up_control,   "DEG_up_in_control.csv",   row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(down_control, "DEG_down_in_control.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# Save gene ID lists
write.table(up_disease$gene_id,
            "DEG_up_in_disease_geneIDs.txt",
            row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE)

write.table(down_disease$gene_id,
            "DEG_down_in_disease_geneIDs.txt",
            row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE)
```

# Consistent DEG up-regulated in SCA17
```{r}
#| echo: false
df.up <- read.table(
  "data/up_disease/enrichment_results_wg_result1772644621.txt",
  header = TRUE,
  sep = "\t",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  fill = TRUE,
  quote = "")

datatable(
  df.up,
  caption = "Table 4. Consistent DEG up-regulated in PD.",
  style = "bootstrap5",
  extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(
    dom = 'lBfrtip',
    buttons = c('csv','excel')
  )
)
```


# Consistent DEG down-regulated in SCA17
```{r}
#| echo: false
df.up <- read.table(
  "data/down_disease/enrichment_results_wg_result1772644983.txt",
  header = TRUE,
  sep = "\t",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  fill = TRUE,
  quote = "")

datatable(
  df.up,
  caption = "Table 5. Consistent DEG down-regulated in PD.",
  style = "bootstrap5",
  extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(
    dom = 'lBfrtip',
    buttons = c('csv','excel')
  )
)
```


# Enrichment analysis
[Figure 6](data/enrichment_up.svg)

![Figure 6. Enriched Reactome pathways for SCA17 linked DEGs up-regulated.](data/enrichment_up.svg)


# STRING analysis
[Figure 7 - STRING website](https://string-db.org/cgi/network?taskId=bQzdX6OcILCW&sessionId=bJpKvI8g9R1r)

![Figure 7. STRING protein interaction network of SCA17 linked DEGs up-regulated.](data/string_up.png)


# Enrichment analysis
[Figure 8](data/enrichment_down.svg)

![Figure 8. Enriched Reactome pathways for SCA17 linked DEGs down-regulated.](data/enrichment_down.svg)


# STRING analysis
[Figure 9 - STRING website](https://string-db.org/cgi/network?taskId=bkcYDSR0EtqO&sessionId=bJpKvI8g9R1r)

![Figure 9. STRING protein interaction network of SCA17 linked DEGs down-regulated.](data/string_down.png)
